raw_title: “I Empathize With Them”: How Newsroom Leadership Assesses Mental Health and Hostility Toward Their Journalists
title_en: “I Empathize With Them”: How Newsroom Leadership Assesses Mental Health and Hostility Toward Their Journalists
title_zh: “我同情他们”：新闻编辑室领导如何评估记者的心理健康和敌意
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨新闻编辑室的领导如何看待和处理记者面临的心理健康问题和职场敌意。研究发现领导们虽然表示同情，但可能缺乏有效的评估和支持机制。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how newsroom leaders perceive and address mental health issues and workplace hostility faced by journalists. It finds that while leaders express empathy, they may lack effective assessment and support mechanisms.
research_direction_zh: 探索新闻行业中的组织文化和领导力如何影响记者的心理健康和工作环境，为改善媒体工作场所提供理论和实践指导。
research_direction_en: Investigating how organizational culture and leadership in journalism affect journalists' mental health and work environment, providing theoretical and practical guidance for improving media workplaces.
